name: Divine Sense
description: You can open your awareness to detect the presence of powerful celestial, fiendish, and undead creatures, as well as consecrated or desecrated places.

name: Lay on Hands
description: You have a pool of healing power that you can use to restore hit points or cure certain diseases and poisons.

name: Divine Smite
description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend a spell slot to deal additional radiant damage to the target.

name: Divine Health
description: The divine magic flowing through you makes you immune to disease.

name: Sacred Oath
description: Choose a Sacred Oath, which grants additional features and Channel Divinity options as you gain Paladin levels.

name: Channel Divinity
description: You can channel divine energy to fuel magical effects. The available options are determined by your Sacred Oath.

name: Aura of Protection
description: You and nearby allies gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier while you are conscious.

name: Aura of Courage
description: You and nearby allies cannot be frightened while you are conscious.

name: Cleansing Touch
description: You can end one spell affecting yourself or another willing creature by touching the target.
